seo.title: Home Inspection Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your home inspection business. Route upset clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Home Inspection Services

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Home Inspection Services
hero.subheading: Reports are long and deadlines are tight. ReviewFlo asks after delivery when buyers and agents still remember your walk-through.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Home Inspector Faces

items.heading: Missed items surface months later
items.body: Anger lands on your Google profile even when the issue was hidden.

items.heading: Neutral reports feel forgettable
items.body: No drama reads like “nothing special,” not five stars.

items.heading: Agents rush to the next showing
items.body: Nobody closes with a review ask at the driveway.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Home Inspectors

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after report delivery
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the PDF is in their inbox.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask before closing day noise
items.body: Send while your summary is still the main topic.

items.heading: Private first for report disputes
items.body: Serious concerns reach you before public fights.

items.heading: Buyers and investors
items.body: Same flow for first homes and rentals.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when you made a stressful purchase feel clearer.
Keep public asks about communication and thoroughness, not guarantees.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Send after the full package they booked.
Reviews still help your own Business Profile when buyers search you.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Home Inspection Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
